children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, and store in patients data store
semantic_inputs: input: JSON with patient details (name, age, contact, medical_history)
semantic_outputs: result: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message
postconditions: patient record created in patients data store

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient registration details including name, age, contact, and medical_history

outputs.name: registration_result
outputs.description: Result containing success status, patient_id, and message

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, check appointment slot availability, and store appointment in appointments data store
semantic_inputs: input: JSON with patient ID and appointment details (date, time, doctor)
semantic_outputs: result: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message
postconditions: appointment record created in appointments data store

inputs.name: appointment_data
inputs.description: Appointment booking details including patient_id, date, time, and doctor

outputs.name: booking_result
outputs.description: Result containing success status, appointment_id, and message

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, fetch records from patients data store (append-only), and return them
semantic_outputs: result: JSON with success status, records data, and message

inputs.name: patient_id
inputs.description: Unique identifier of the patient whose records to retrieve

outputs.name: records_result
outputs.description: Result containing success status, records (list of record entries), and message

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.purpose: Update profile information for a registered patient
children.behavior: Validate patient exists, update patient profile fields in patients data store
semantic_inputs: input: JSON with patient ID and updated profile fields
semantic_outputs: result: JSON with success status, updated profile, and message
postconditions: patient profile updated in patients data store

inputs.name: update_data
inputs.description: Dictionary containing patient_id and fields to update (e.g., name, age, contact)

outputs.name: update_result
outputs.description: Result containing success status, updated profile, and message

dataflow_edges.note: Parent routes registration command to RegisterPatient
Parent routes booking command to BookAppointment
Parent routes records command to GetRecords
Parent routes update command to UpdateProfile
